steps.title: Connect need to response
steps.content: The first sentence says rising demand for region-specific cheeses created a need to verify authenticity claims. The next sentence explains that the European Union created DOP status to certify local tradition.

steps.title: Choose the causal transition
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D signal contrast, but the EU action responds to the need. Choice C signals restatement, but DOP status is a solution rather than a rewording of the problem. The transition must show that the verification need caused the label to be established. The answer is B.
